[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011100011 6
1 1101011001 6
2 1101110100 6
3 0011011111 7
4 1000111011 6
5 1110000111 6
6 1100100000 3
7 1101100000 4

70 07 1100011110 6

13 31 1110010101 6
24 42 0101100101 5
35 53 0000010100 2
46 64 0011001101 5
57 75 0001111110 6
60 06 0011110011 6
71 17 1111111111 a

03 30 1101110100 6 match 2
14 41 0011011111 7 match 3
25 52 1000111011 6 match 4
36 63 1110000111 6 match 5
47 74 1100100000 3 match 6
50 05 1101100000 4 match 7
61 16 0000010010 2
72 27 1001000101 4

37 73 0001101010 4
